item.title: She Followed Him to Paradise Then Vanished: The Murder of Yvonne Baldelli
item.description: Life seemed to be ideal for Yvonne Baldelli. She had just left her successful management job and moved to Panama with her ex-marine boyfriend, Brian Brimager. To her family in the States, Yvonne’s island life seemed picaresque, with descriptions of walks on the beach and playing music at local bars. But when those happy emails stopped, Brian returned to the U.S. and married a new woman within two weeks. The only question: where was Yvonne?

media:content.media:title: She Followed Him to Paradise Then Vanished: The Murder of Yvonne Baldelli
media:content.media:description: Life seemed to be ideal for Yvonne Baldelli. She had just left her successful management job and moved to Panama with her ex-marine boyfriend, Brian Brimager. To her family in the States, Yvonne’s island life seemed picaresque, with descriptions of walks on the beach and playing music at local bars. But when those happy emails stopped, Brian returned to the U.S. and married a new woman within two weeks. The only question: where was Yvonne?

item.title: From Tinder Match to Deadly Stalker: The Murder of Molly McLaren
item.description: Molly McLaren’s life was very promising. As a college student with a keen interest in fitness and nutrition, she had amassed a following on social media through honest posts about her struggles with mental health and wellness, and for inspiring others to live life to the fullest. But after she met a man named Joshua Stimpson on Tinder, that same honesty and struggles with mental health were used against her as he stalked and harassed her on the internet and in real life. Only two weeks after they broke up, Josh stalked her to her gym and murdered Molly in broad daylight. This raises the question: how well do you know the people you meet online?

media:content.media:title: From Tinder Match to Deadly Stalker: The Murder of Molly McLaren
media:content.media:description: Molly McLaren’s life was very promising. As a college student with a keen interest in fitness and nutrition, she had amassed a following on social media through honest posts about her struggles with mental health and wellness, and for inspiring others to live life to the fullest. But after she met a man named Joshua Stimpson on Tinder, that same honesty and struggles with mental health were used against her as he stalked and harassed her on the internet and in real life. Only two weeks after they broke up, Josh stalked her to her gym and murdered Molly in broad daylight. This raises the question: how well do you know the people you meet online?

item.title: The Wild Case Of Fake German Heiress Anna "Delvey" Sorokin & How She Scammed Her Way To The Top
item.description: Anna Sorokin convinced New York’s wealthiest circles that she was a German heiress with millions to spend. From luxury hotels to private jets, she lived a high end lifestyle without paying for any of it. But as unpaid bills piled up and her story began to crack, investigators uncovered a web of deception that shocked the city. How did one woman fool banks, businesses, and the elite for so long?

media:content.media:title: The Wild Case Of Fake German Heiress Anna "Delvey" Sorokin & How She Scammed Her Way To The Top
media:content.media:description: Anna Sorokin convinced New York’s wealthiest circles that she was a German heiress with millions to spend. From luxury hotels to private jets, she lived a high end lifestyle without paying for any of it. But as unpaid bills piled up and her story began to crack, investigators uncovered a web of deception that shocked the city. How did one woman fool banks, businesses, and the elite for so long?

item.title: Sherri Papini: The Truth Is SHOCKING!
item.description: In November 2016, Sherri Papini of Redding, California was reported missing and found three weeks later claiming she had been abducted by two women. Investigators later determined she had been staying with a former boyfriend. In 2022, she pleaded guilty to mail fraud and making false statements to federal agents and was sentenced to 18 months in prison. She was released in 2023 after serving approximately 11 months.

media:content.media:title: Sherri Papini: The Truth Is SHOCKING!
media:content.media:description: In November 2016, Sherri Papini of Redding, California was reported missing and found three weeks later claiming she had been abducted by two women. Investigators later determined she had been staying with a former boyfriend. In 2022, she pleaded guilty to mail fraud and making false statements to federal agents and was sentenced to 18 months in prison. She was released in 2023 after serving approximately 11 months.

item.title: These Children Remember Being WWII Pilots and Titanic Victims
item.description: Since the dawn of time, just about every culture on earth has asked the question: What happens after you die? While many religions and faiths propose some form of afterlife, many also believe in reincarnation. And for those at the University of Virginia’s Department of Perceptual Studies, children in particular are susceptible to remembering elements of their past lives. From WWII bombers to Titanic victims, today we’re going over a few of these stories and asking the question: Can you remember your past life?

media:content.media:title: These Children Remember Being WWII Pilots and Titanic Victims
media:content.media:description: Since the dawn of time, just about every culture on earth has asked the question: What happens after you die? While many religions and faiths propose some form of afterlife, many also believe in reincarnation. And for those at the University of Virginia’s Department of Perceptual Studies, children in particular are susceptible to remembering elements of their past lives. From WWII bombers to Titanic victims, today we’re going over a few of these stories and asking the question: Can you remember your past life?

item.title: Teen Attacked Outside Library SURVIVES: The Amazing Story Of Queena Phu
item.description: Queena Phu was just 17 years old when she was brutally attacked outside a library in Gaithersburg. Despite the severity of her injuries, Queena survived and became a powerful symbol of resilience. As investigators worked to identify those responsible, the case drew attention to youth violence, community safety, and the strength it takes to rebuild after unimaginable trauma.

media:content.media:title: Teen Attacked Outside Library SURVIVES: The Amazing Story Of Queena Phu
media:content.media:description: Queena Phu was just 17 years old when she was brutally attacked outside a library in Gaithersburg. Despite the severity of her injuries, Queena survived and became a powerful symbol of resilience. As investigators worked to identify those responsible, the case drew attention to youth violence, community safety, and the strength it takes to rebuild after unimaginable trauma.
